sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22984" key="gu/mnhtis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γύμνητ-ις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γυμνήτης,</foreign> in signf. of <sense id="n22984.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γυμνής</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σοφία,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.332b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
